holdings.n: State Street Communication Services Select Sector SPDR ETF

holdings.infoBox: NOEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 412 individual holdings. The top holdings are State Street® SPDR® S&P 500® ETF stock at 14.08%, Vanguard Information Technology ETF at 14.06%, Alphabet at 7.43%, Exxon Mobil at 5.80%, and Merck & Co. at 5.77%.

overview.description: The Northern Trust US Equity ETF (NOEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to invest in mid- and large-cap US companies. The fund also employs strategies to minimize taxable capital gain distributions. NOEQ was launched on Mar 20, 2026 and is issued by Northern Trust.
